270 I0500_DVT_CD I0500_DVT_CD I0500 Active Diagnoses: Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had a diagnosis of deep vein thrombosis, pulmonary embolus (PE) or pulmonary thrombo-embolism (PTE) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
